# flagcdn.io — Full Documentation

> Free SVG country flag icons with CDN delivery. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes. 4:3 and 1:1 aspect ratios. MIT licensed.

## Overview

flagcdn.io is a free, non-profit CDN for country flag icons in SVG format. It is based on the open-source lipis/flag-icons project with additional flags, SVG fixes, and free CDN hosting. The service provides 270+ flags covering all ISO 3166-1 countries and territories, plus additional non-ISO flags for regions and organizations.

---

## 1. Include CSS

Add one of these stylesheets to your HTML `<head>`:

### flagcdn.io CDN (recommended)
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://flagcdn.io/css/flag-icons.min.css" />
```

### jsDelivr
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/flag-icons@7/css/flag-icons.min.css" />
```

### cdnjs
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/flag-icons/7.5.0/css/flag-icons.min.css" />
```

---

## 2. HTML Usage

Use the `fi` base class with a country-code class `fi-xx`:

### 4:3 Aspect Ratio (default)
```html
<span class="fi fi-us"></span>
<span class="fi fi-cn"></span>
<span class="fi fi-gb"></span>
```

### 1:1 Square Aspect Ratio
Add the `fis` class:
```html
<span class="fi fi-us fis"></span>
<span class="fi fi-cn fis"></span>
```

### Background Image Mode
Use the `fib` class with explicit dimensions:
```html
<span class="fi fi-cn fib" style="width:32px;height:24px;display:inline-block;"></span>
```

---

## 3. Direct SVG URLs

You can link to flag SVGs directly:

| Format | URL Pattern | Example |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| 4:3 | `https://flagcdn.io/flags/4x3/{code}.svg` | `https://flagcdn.io/flags/4x3/us.svg` |
| 1:1 | `https://flagcdn.io/flags/1x1/{code}.svg` | `https://flagcdn.io/flags/1x1/us.svg` |
| Short (4:3) | `https://flagcdn.io/{code}.svg` | `https://flagcdn.io/us.svg` |

Use in `<img>` tags:
```html
<img src="https://flagcdn.io/flags/4x3/jp.svg" alt="Japan" width="32" />
```

All flag URLs support CORS (`Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`) for cross-origin usage.

---

## 4. Country Codes

Flags use lowercase ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes. Common examples:

| Code | Country | Code | Country |
|------|---------|------|---------|
| us | United States | cn | China |
| gb | United Kingdom | jp | Japan |
| de | Germany | fr | France |
| in | India | br | Brazil |
| kr | South Korea | ru | Russia |
| au | Australia | ca | Canada |
| eu | European Union | un | United Nations |

The full list of 270+ codes is available on the homepage at https://flagcdn.io/ with search and filtering by continent.

---

## 5. API Endpoints

### Country Data
`GET https://flagcdn.io/data/country.json`

Returns JSON array of all countries with:
- `code` — ISO alpha-2 code
- `name` — English name
- `name_zh`, `name_ja`, `name_de`, `name_ru`, `name_ar` — Translated names
- `continent` — Continent name
- `capital` — Capital city
- `iso` — Boolean, true if ISO 3166-1
- `flag_4x3`, `flag_1x1` — SVG file paths

### Download Stats
`GET https://flagcdn.io/api/download-count.php`

Returns: `{"count": 12345}`

### Site Analytics
`GET https://flagcdn.io/api/stats.php`

Returns Cloudflare analytics (30-day):
```json
{
  "requests": 1234567,
  "visitors": 45678,
  "bytes": 9876543210,
  "pageViews": 23456,
  "since": "2026-03-11",
  "until": "2026-04-10"
}
```

---

## 6. Features

- **270+ flags**: All ISO 3166-1 countries/territories plus non-ISO flags
- **SVG format**: Infinitely scalable, lightweight, sharp at any size
- **Two aspect ratios**: 4:3 (standard) and 1:1 (square)
- **Three usage modes**: CSS classes, direct SVG URLs, background images
- **Free CDN**: Fast delivery via Cloudflare, no rate limits
- **CORS enabled**: All flag assets allow cross-origin requests
- **Multilingual UI**: English, Chinese, Japanese, German, Russian, Arabic
- **Dark mode**: Automatic theme detection with manual toggle
- **Interactive map**: Click any flag to see the country on a Leaflet map
- **Search & filter**: Real-time search by name (6 languages) or country code
- **One-click copy**: Copy HTML snippet or image URL to clipboard
- **Bulk download**: Download all flags as a ZIP archive
- **MIT license**: Free for personal and commercial use

---

## 7. Technical Details

- **Hosting**: Nginx + PHP 8.5 behind Cloudflare CDN
- **Cache**: Static assets cached 30 days, CSS/JS cached 12 hours
- **Data format**: All flag data stored as JSON, no database required
- **File sizes**: Individual SVGs range from ~300 bytes to ~50 KB
- **Source**: Based on https://github.com/lipis/flag-icons (MIT license)

---
